name: Large Language Models in Misinformation Ecosystems: Misuse, Defense, and Vulnerability

description: arXiv:2607.10402v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have transformed misinformation from a primarily content-centric problem into a broader ecosystem-level security challenge.
